---
title: "Live_probability"
author: "Sahifa"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
```


Consider rolling two dies and finding the sum of their faces.

```{r}
prob = tibble(x = 2:12, `P(x)` = round(c(1:6, 5:1)/36, 2))

prob
sum(prob$`P(x)`)

mean = sum(prob$x*prob$`P(x)`) # expected value or the mean of the prob dist for X

mean(prob$x) # usually doesn't work, functions like mean, sd, var are best used with data points
mean(prob$`P(x)`)
```

```{r}
sum((prob$x - mean)^2*prob$`P(x)`) # variance

sqrt(sum((prob$x - mean)^2*prob$`P(x)`))
```







```{r}
tibble(
  x = 0:4,
  p = c(0.15, 0.25, 0.05, 0.35, NA)
) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = x, values_from = p) %>% 
  mutate(x = "P(X=x)") %>% 
  relocate(x)
```
